And he commanded them, saying, This [is] the thing that ye shall do; A third part of you that enter in on the sabbath shall even be keepers of the watch of the king's house;

On Friday the women had prepared spices and ointments and then on Saturday, the Sabbath, they rested, "according to the commandment" (Luke 23:56). Now on Sunday morning they brought "the spices which they had prepared" (Luke 24:1). The Greek word for spice is aroma.
